creator: darklogik@pittgoth.com
text:
Try this patch please, its an update to chroot(8) that adds jail(8) to see also

Tom Rhodes
www.Pittgoth.com
www.FreeBSD.org


*** chroot.8.old	Thu Dec 27 13:42:59 2001
--- chroot.8	Thu Dec 27 13:51:02 2001
***************
*** 73,79 ****
  .Sh SEE ALSO
  .Xr chdir 2 ,
  .Xr chroot 2 ,
! .Xr environ 7
  .Sh HISTORY
  The
  .Nm
--- 73,80 ----
  .Sh SEE ALSO
  .Xr chdir 2 ,
  .Xr chroot 2 ,
! .Xr environ 7 ,
! .Xr jail 8
  .Sh HISTORY
  The
  .Nm
